summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QR Detail Page (/qr/:profileId), QR Customize Page (/qr/:profileId/customize), and updated dashboard card buttons. All 16 new backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all features work correctly: navigation, color presets, live preview, download, and reset functionality.

minor.issue: Console warning about chart dimensions when page first loads (Recharts library)

issues: Chart shows warning about negative dimensions on initial load - Recharts library issue, not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: QRDetailPage.js correctly implements all required features: profile info, stats cards, 30-day chart, QR preview, action buttons
QRCustomizePage.js properly handles 8 color presets, custom color pickers, size/border sliders, live preview, download
QRProfileCard.js has correct 'Detalles' and 'Ver QR' buttons with proper data-testid attributes
Backend /details endpoint returns correct structure: profile, total_scans, recent_scans, daily_data (30 days)
Backend /generate-qr and /generate-qr-custom endpoints return valid PNG images (200 status)
Color preset changes in customize page update preview in real-time via API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR Detail and Customize features fully verified. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_qr_detail_customize.py covers: /details (5 tests), /generate-qr (3 tests), /generate-qr-custom (6 tests), integration (2 tests). Total 16 tests passing. Dashboard cards have 'Detalles' button navigating to /qr/{id} and 'Ver QR' button opening public profile in new tab.

elements_verified: Stats cards (total scans, last 30 days, creation date, expiration)
Recent scans table with empty state
Action buttons: Ver Perfil Público, Descargar QR, Personalizar QR, Editar, Pausar, Eliminar
8 color presets (Clásico, Azul Corporativo, Rojo Médico, Verde Natural, Púrpura, Oscuro, Naranja, Cian)
Live QR preview updates on color change
'Ver QR' button opens /profile/{hash} in new tab
Both buttons have correct data-testid attributes
